description: Operator-tagged metadata for a Meta ad creative. Joined to AdSpend ad-level rows by ad_id. Hook, concept and creator are not exposed by the Meta API, so they are tagged here and drive the Creative Analyzer rollups.
name: AdCreativeMeta

ad_id.description: Meta ad id. Join key to AdSpend rows where level = ad.

ad_name.description: Meta ad name at time of tagging, for display when spend rows are outside the window.

concept.description: Creative concept, for example ER Waiting Room.

creator.description: Creator or production source, for example a UGC creator name or Studio.

hook.description: Opening hook line used in the creative.

utm_content.description: Optional utm_content value this ad passes to the funnel, used to join verified lead outcomes back to the creative.
